design_principles: Asymmetry & Tension: Use broken grids, staggered cards, and generous whitespace. Avoid standard centered text blocks.
Editorial Typography: Oversized headlines using Sora with tight tracking (-0.02em to -0.04em) paired with structured, clean Inter body text.
Restrained Accent: Use Aksharaa Orange (#F28C28) only for critical CTAs, active states, progress indicators, and micro-interactions. Never as large background blocks.
Motion as Structure: Use motion to reveal hierarchy—staggered fades, growing connection lines in lifecycles, and subtle hover lift on cards.
No Generic Components: Customize all buttons and cards. Buttons are fully rounded (pill) with subtle shadow. Cards use specific border and hover lifts.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-tight text-[#1C2A39] dark:text-white
scales.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#1C2A39] dark:text-white
scales.h3: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#1C2A39] dark:text-white
scales.kicker: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#F28C28]

buttons.primary: bg-[#F28C28] hover:bg-[#C66A18] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(242,140,40,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(242,140,40,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1C2A39] text-[#1C2A39] hover:bg-[#1C2A39] hover:text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.dark_secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/30 text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-[#1C2A39] px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300

cards.light: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 relative overflow-hidden
cards.dark: bg-[#2E3B4E] border border-white/5 hover:bg-[#3A4A5A] transition-all duration-500 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 relative overflow-hidden

components.data_chip: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/90 border border-white/20 shadow-lg rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center gap-4 text-[#1C2A39]

animations.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }} transition={{ duration: 0.7, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}
animations.line_growth: initial={{ width: 0, height: 0 }} whileInView={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }} transition={{ duration: 1.2, ease: 'easeInOut' }}
animations.counter: Use framer-motion useMotionValue, useSpring, and useTransform to animate numbers from 0 to value on scroll reveal.

sections.layout: Flexbox row, justified between items-center. Hidden on small mobile.
sections.content: Phone (+91 98402 76677), Email, Social links (LinkedIn, X, Facebook, Instagram). Thin strip, text-xs. Monochrome lucide-react icons with orange hover.

sections.layout: Sticky z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, flex between items-center. Full mega menus dropping down as asymmetric bento panels.
sections.content: Logo left. Balanced nav links center. Compact CTA button right. Mobile gets fullscreen layered nav panel.

sections.layout: Asymmetrical 12-col grid. Content spans 7 cols left. Snapshot card floats 4 cols right. Subtle radial/grid lines in absolute bg.
sections.content: Eyebrow 'Trusted by 500+ Businesses Across India', Oversized H1 stack 'Governance-Driven / Corporate / Compliance'. Subtext. 2 CTAs. Stat row. Right card 'Governance Domains'.

sections.layout: Full width marquee via react-fast-marquee or CSS animation.
sections.content: 'Trusted by Leading Organisations' text. Logos (Alibaba, Blue Dart, Godrej, L&T, Mercedes-Benz) rendered cleanly in grayscale, opacity-40 hover:opacity-100.

sections.layout: Asymmetrical 2-col. Left: large high-end architectural building image. Floating '98% Client Retention' chip overlapping. Right: Text block with structured offset.
sections.content: H2 'A Governance-Structured Compliance Partner'. Quote callout ('Governance is not an add-on to compliance...'), paragraphs, 'About Aksharaa' button.

sections.layout: Horizontal rail layout (desktop), stacked (mobile). Connected nodes with growing progress line via framer-motion.
sections.content: Kicker 'Compliance Architecture'. 5 stages: 01 Register, 02 Operate, 03 File, 04 Audit, 05 Scale.

sections.layout: 4 Framed pillars with variable sizing (bento-style/masonry logic). Large ghost numbers.
sections.content: Kicker 'Framework'. H2 'A Structured Governance Framework...'. 01 Advisory Oversight, 02 Operational Discipline, 03 Regulatory Execution, 04 Documented Reporting. Identity statement anchor.

sections.layout: Left intro block (4 cols) with heavy negative space. Right broken modular grid (8 cols) of 6 cards.
sections.content: Left: Intro note. Right Cards: Payroll, Labour Law, Contract Staffing, HR Doc, Multi-Location, Licensing. Icons + subtext.

sections.layout: Two column split. Control room feel. Data grid texture background.
sections.content: Kicker 'Risk & Control'. Common Risk Zones (6 items) vs Governance-Led Mitigation (6 items). Highlighted closing axiom.

sections.layout: 6 staggered architectural cards (asymmetric layout). Huge numbering 01-06 overlapping card edges.
sections.content: Kicker 'Compliance Domains'. Business Reg, Labour Law, Payroll, GST, Legal Doc, Licensing. 'Explore domain' text-arrow.
Kicker 'Control Systems'. 01 Calendar Tracking, 02 Multi-Layer Review, 03 Doc Governance, 04 Inspection Readiness. Hover border glow / orange micro-accents.

sections.layout: Typography-led sequential directional layout. Progressive scroll reveal step-by-step.
sections.content: Kicker 'Engagement Model'. 01 Consult & Structure, 02 Prepare & Align, 03 Execute & File, 04 Monitor & Govern.

sections.layout: Horizontal band. Large counters with animated divider lines.
sections.content: Kicker 'Institutional Scale'. 500+ Establishments, 15+ Years, 6+ Domains, Pan-India Coverage.

sections.layout: Centered but asymmetrical text layout. Huge 'GOVERNANCE' watermark text in absolute background.
sections.content: Kicker 'Begin Your Engagement'. H2 'Ready to Structure...'. Dominant Orange CTA, Secondary CTA.

sections.layout: Multi-column premium grid. High contrast spacing.
sections.content: Brand info, Contact block, Service Links, Legal. Better column rhythm.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build strictly as a frontend-only static React page using Tailwind CSS, framer-motion, and lucide-react.
Implement the exact 15 sections in the specified order.
Do NOT use placeholder texts or missing images. Use the provided Unsplash URLs or lucide icons.
For the trust strip logos, simulate them using stylized typography or generic icon components if SVGs are unavailable, but ensure it looks like a premium monochrome ribbon.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) as required by the test framework.
Ensure section transitions have high contrast where a light section meets a dark section.
Apply the `kicker` typography style heavily to section subheadings (e.g., 'Compliance Architecture') for that premium editorial look.
Do not wrap JSON in markdown tags when reading this. Only read raw JSON.
Use standard Tailwind grid logic to implement asymmetric bento panels. Combine span-col, grid gaps, and generous padding.
